creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #24)

Did the processes pid 1328 and 1123 start because the variables webcamd_0_flags and webcamd_1_flags are written in /etc/rc.conf?
Otherwise, devd needs to behave in a way that executes what is written in /usr/local/etc/devd/webcamd.conf.
I just need to unplug the cable from my USB camera.
However, the camera soldered directly to the internal circuit needs to be manually activated by adding a argument value corresponding to $cdev after service webcamd start.
